tau_lambda_cdm.where: Sailer+25 Eq. 2 (high-l CMB + CMB lensing + DESI DR2 BAO within LCDM, low-l polarization removed)

tau_lambda_cdm_with_nu.where: Sailer+25 Eq. 2 (same as above but with sum m_nu >= 0.06 eV prior)

tau_pagano_npipe.where: Pagano+20 NPIPE; quoted here as source of sigma_tau ~ 0.006 used in our back-of-envelope

omegam_tau_slope.where: Sailer+25 Fig. 1 (left panel, dashed line); empirical Omega_m(tau) degeneracy in CMB+lensing fits

delta_Omegam_tau_054_to_090.use: quoted in extensions.tex paragraph after line 30

w0wa_pref_tau_006.where: Sailer+25 Evolving dark energy section, tau = 0.06 prior

w0wa_pref_tau_009.where: Sailer+25 Evolving dark energy section, tau = 0.09 prior
